description_long: This is a classical-style marble bust sculpture depicting a bearded male figure with curly hair, draped in a toga-like garment. The bust is mounted on a round pedestal, which itself sits atop a rectangular plinth. The facial features are finely detailed, with deep-set eyes, a prominent nose, and a textured beard and hair. The drapery of the garment is rendered with realistic folds and creases, adding to the lifelike quality of the piece. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with the garment and hair forming a rounded mass, and the overall surface has a matte, slightly rough stone finish.
description: A marble bust of a bearded man in classical attire, mounted on a pedestal with detailed facial features and draped clothing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, curly hair, and draped garment of the bust.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the depth of the hair, and the layered folds of the garment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back of the head and the broad, less detailed drapery across the shoulders.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face and the draped garment, similar to the left but with different shadowing.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a plinth, suitable for placement in public urban spaces such as plazas, parks, or building entrances.
